project_type: React + TypeScript SPA with Vite, AWS Amplify backend, Capacitor for iOS
build_system: Vite with npm scripts. Build: tsc -b && vite build. Dev: vite
test_framework: vitest with @testing-library/react, jsdom environment. Tests co-located as *.test.tsx files. Also has playwright e2e tests.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run test to validate unit tests pass. 2. Run npm run build to validate TypeScript compiles and Vite bundles successfully.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js v22 available. amplify_outputs.json is needed for build (generated by ampx) - may need to mock or create stub for local builds.
contribution_requirements: Uses prettier and eslint via lint-staged on commit. CI runs test:coverage and build.
key_patterns: - Components use @aws-amplify/ui-react primitives (View, Card, Flex, Text, Button, useTheme, ThemeProvider). - main.tsx sets up ThemeProvider with colorMode='dark' hardcoded and defaultDarkModeOverride. - Styling is via CSS files (index.css, main.css, App.css) and inline Amplify token-based styles. - Components access theme tokens via useTheme(). - Tests wrap components in <ThemeProvider> without specifying colorMode.
directory_structure: src/ - main app source. src/components/ - feature components (Countdowns, Countdown, CreateCountdown, Settings). amplify/ - backend resources. e2e/ - playwright e2e tests. public/ - static assets. ios/ - Capacitor iOS project.
